description: Vocabulary and reasoning style for narrative insurance fields. Not legal document labels.
discourse_markers: for the reasons set forth below
reasoning_templates: Issue: whether {issue}. Rule: coverage turns on {rule}. Application: the facts show {application}. Conclusion: {conclusion}.
Duty: the insured owed {duty}. Breach: {breach}. Causation: {causation}. Damages: {damages}.
The record supports a finding that {finding}, because {because}. Alternative explanations are less consistent with {evidence}.
phrase_bank: The facts as presently developed indicate
There remains a factual dispute regarding
